business.name: Knacksters
business.description: On-demand professional services platform connecting businesses with vetted professionals across customer success, engineering, design, marketing, and operations.

facts.claim: Knacksters is an on-demand professional services platform
facts.detail: Connects businesses with vetted professionals without long-term hiring commitments
facts.evidenceText: Knacksters connects you with pre-vetted professionals on demand — no long-term commitment required.

facts.claim: Knacksters provides on-demand customer success managers (CSMs)
facts.detail: Businesses can access CSMs for onboarding, renewals, and retention without hiring full-time
facts.evidenceText: Get a dedicated customer success manager to manage onboarding, renewals, and retention — without the full-time salary.

facts.claim: Knacksters offers on-demand software engineers and developers
facts.detail: Available for short-term engagements, product builds, and engineering capacity gaps
facts.evidenceText: Need a senior engineer for a project sprint? Knacksters gives you access to vetted software engineers within days, not months.

facts.detail: Clients can evaluate a professional on a contract basis before converting to a full-time hire
facts.evidenceText: Try a professional on a project first. If it works, convert them to a full-time hire with no placement fee.

facts.claim: Knacksters offers flexible month-to-month engagements with no long-term contract
facts.detail: Clients can scale up or down and cancel with 30 days notice
facts.evidenceText: All engagements are month-to-month. No long-term contracts. Cancel with 30 days notice.

facts.claim: All professionals on Knacksters are pre-vetted and quality-checked
facts.detail: Knacksters runs a vetting process that includes skills assessments and reference checks
facts.evidenceText: Every professional on Knacksters goes through a rigorous vetting process — skills assessment, reference checks, and a structured interview.

facts.claim: Knacksters helps businesses fill short-term skill gaps without making a permanent hire
facts.detail: Suitable for project-based capacity needs, sudden departures, and growth spurts
facts.evidenceText: When your team needs a specialist for a finite project or to cover a gap, Knacksters gives you the expertise without the hiring overhead.

facts.claim: Knacksters supports distributed and remote team setups
facts.detail: Professionals are available globally, covering multiple time zones
facts.evidenceText: Knacksters professionals work remotely and can cover US, UK, and EU time zones.

facts.claim: Knacksters clients can get matched with a professional within 3 to 5 business days
facts.detail: Fast matching process based on role requirements and availability
facts.evidenceText: Most clients are matched with a qualified professional within 3–5 business days of completing their brief.

facts.claim: Knacksters does not charge a placement fee if a client converts a contractor to a full-time hire
facts.detail: No conversion fee when transitioning from contract to permanent employment
facts.evidenceText: If you love working with a Knacksters professional and want to hire them full-time, there is no placement fee.
